ValidationRule.description: Validation rule only allowing members of the Compliance team members to approve Newsletter emails
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND($Profile.Name !='Carmignac - Legal and Compliance', Approved_by_Compliance__c = TRUE,ISCHANGED( Approved_by_Compliance__c ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only members of the Compliance team can approve Newsletter Emails. Please contact Compliance through Chatter if you require approval for your Newsletter
